$comment: Layer A for INVOICE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Generated amounts include zero and span the PIC 9(7)V99 range, so both the early-exit validation path and the billed fall-through path are exercised by seeded random inputs alone.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 INVOICE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-invoice)
